summary: Completed frontend navigation testing for Torado ERP sidebar refactor (Phase 1 UI/UX 2026-06). Tested login, portal switching, sidebar navigation, flattened sections, in-page tabs, and pill-links across all 8 portals.

navigation_issues.note: Flattened Analytics section navigates correctly but page content is blank (0 chars)
Flattened Reservasi section navigates correctly but page content is blank
Flattened Master Data section navigates correctly but page content is blank

Flattened CMS Studio section navigates correctly but page content is blank
Flattened Smart SEO section navigates correctly but page content is blank
Flattened AI Insights section navigates correctly, body text shows 772 chars but screenshot shows blank screen - may be loading state or async content
Flattened Daily Orders section navigates correctly, body text shows 668 chars but screenshot shows blank screen - may be loading state

navigation_issues.component: Outlet Portal - End of Day page
navigation_issues.note: Flattened End of Day section navigates correctly, body text shows 2315 chars but screenshot shows blank screen - may be loading state

passed_tests: Login flow works with admin@torado.id / Torado@2026
Portal selector shows all 8 portals (Owner, Executive, Outlet, Procurement, Inventory, Finance, HR, Admin)
Portal switching works for 7/8 portals without white screen (Owner, Finance, Procurement, Outlet, Executive, Inventory, HR)
Finance > Journals navigation works and renders content with real data (journal entries, Rp values)
Finance > Reports (flattened section) works as direct link and shows 6 in-page tabs (Trial Balance, Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, Cashflow, Period Compare, Custom Reports)
Finance > Tax Center navigation works and renders content
Finance sidebar structure correct: 8 sections, 23 nav items
Procurement > All Vendors page shows all 4 pill-links (Vendor Comparison, Vendor Scorecard, AI Vendor Recommend, Vendor Item Catalog)
Owner > Cash Position (flattened Financial Health) works and renders real financial data (Net Liquid Cash Rp 728,185,000, AP Exposure, cash runway, account balances)
Outlet > CRM Hub (flattened CRM & Reservasi) works and renders real data (251 loyalty members, reservation stats, quick actions)
Sidebar flattened sections render as direct links (no chevron) for single-item sections
No React console errors or import errors during navigation
Data renders with real seeded values (Rp amounts, dates, transaction details)

success_percentage.executive_navigation: 0% (0/2 tested pages render correctly, both blank screens)
success_percentage.admin_navigation: 0% (0/4 tested pages render correctly, all blank screens)

action_item_for_main_agent: Investigate blank/white screen issues on 9 pages across Executive, Admin, Owner, and Outlet portals. Pages navigate correctly (URLs change, sidebar highlights update) but content area is blank. Check if pages are: (1) still loading/async content not awaited, (2) missing page components, (3) have rendering errors. Priority: Admin portal pages (4 blank pages), Executive portal pages (2 blank pages), then Outlet/Owner pages (3 blank pages with some body text detected).
